titleStmt.title: SII 10.758: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 758. (A.R. No. 323 of 1922.) ON A ROCK ON THE BANK OF THE STREAM TO THE WEST OF DĒVULACHERUVU, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. Ś. 1580. (Ānanda)

summary.p: Records the measurement of certain land in Dēvulachervu about which there was a dispute. At this time, Ajarati was governing Gōlkoṇḍa, Chandragiri, Ghaṇḍikōṭa etc. provinces after Rāmadēvarāya's rule at Ānegondi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma . svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1580 Agu nēṭi Ā
naṁdasaṁvatsara jēṣṭa ba 10lu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīrarāmadēvarāyalayyavāru Ānegoṁdiśiṁhvā
sanamaṁddu pṛthvi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁ
nna tadaṁttaramaṁddu Ajarati gōlako
ṁḍa caṁdragiri ghaṁḍikōṭa modalaina rājyālu cēstuṁḍi makhāĀlaṁ
khānukumāra mamudukhānunigāriki
pāḷeṁ yēlubaḍi mukhāsā yicci vuṁḍri ganaka liṁgōjīpaṁtulaku pārupatyaṁ
yicci vuṁḍaṁgānu liṁgōjipaṁttulu sōṁpalli karaṇaṁ nārāyaṇaku dēvulacervu grāmaṁ pārupa
tyaṁ yicci vuṁḍaṁganu Ānārāyaṇappa dēvulacervu grāmaṁ parāmarisika śāya gā kritamaṁ
nīrāraṁbhaṁ maḷlu piccalu śēśi vuṁḍri ganaka Āpiccamaḷlu sāgubaḷlu kāvani nā rāyaṇaku liṁgō
tulaku telpukōgā yīdēvulacervu grāmamlō cellē gānulavāri palle kāluvanu nāgiśeṭigāri yēṁḍu
staḷaṁ koltaprakāraṁ śelavu yiccināru ganaka Ānāgiśeṭigāri yēṁḍuna maḍistaḷaṁ cēnu śrīveṁkaṭādri
śi vuṁḍagā koṁḍala tiṁmmaya Akkappacināri veṁkaṭādrila kula Appaya yāṭanu yīnalugurnu
kolipiṁcina vivaraṁ gaḍapramāṇaṁ kāluvapalli cinaciṁnapareḍḍigāri sanapareḍḍi Aḍugu
na maḍi 1ki kuṁṭalu 257 Āye ganaka Āprakāraṁ ghaḍa kaṭṭaḍaśēśi yicci śelavuyiccenu
kālvapalli nārāyaṇappa kolipiṁcci vakaṭidaḍiyamūranu cinavābareḍḍi Aḍugu
yevaru tappinā tama tallitaṁḍrādula vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōdu ru
Digital edition of SII 10.758 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
